request: Review recent Generator invocation and Validator validation pipeline configuration and real invocation test fixes, then report remaining issues and final Tier classification.
request_original: 최근에 Generator 호출 문제와 Validator 검증 문제 파이프라인 구성 및 실제 호출 테스트 진행했고 관련해서 오류들을 잡긴했는데 너가 이부분 한번도 꼼꼼히 재검토 해줘 Tier 몇인지도 마지막에 알려주고
tier_rationale: Review/report task with no intended product or harness code changes. If implementation changes become necessary, reclassify based on impact.

include: Recent task ledgers and specs related to Generator and Validator pipeline fixes
Automated audit/test scripts relevant to the handoff and validation flow
exclude: Running external model CLIs unless needed to confirm a concrete finding
Changing product or harness behavior unless user asks for follow-up implementation

success_criteria: Identify concrete remaining defects or risks in the recent Generator/Validator pipeline work, with file and line references where applicable.
Distinguish confirmed issues from residual risks or unverified assumptions.
Run lightweight local checks where useful and report any checks not run.
State final Tier classification at the end.

positive: Follow repository work-history and session re-entry rules.
Do not expose secrets or environment variable values.
Use code-review style findings first if defects are found.
negative: Do not modify completed historical ledger events except via append-only correction if required.
